Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Wei Jin Amon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Wei Jin Amon is someone Kelsa might fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 9''' — Wei Jin Amon is the blood grandson of the Patriarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Jin Amon uses a spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Jin Amon has an iron badge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Wei Jin Amon uses purple foxfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Wei Jin Amon was crouched with a spear ready for battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Wei Jin Amon is a member of the Wei clan who was injured.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Amon was defeated by the hornet Remnants.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Wei Jin Amon's grandfather is a member of the Wei clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Amon is the grandson of the Wei clan Patriarch.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
